news.headline: Linker Finance partners with Bank of Brodhead for Vault.Bank launch, expanding community banking solutions.
news.summary: In Pasadena, California, on February 20, 2025, Linker Finance made a major announcement. The company, specializing in a modern mobile and online banking platform for community banks, revealed an exciting new partnership. They will be teaming up with Bank of Brodhead, a bank from Wisconsin, for the launch of Vault.Bank - a groundbreaking initiative that will redefine the banking experience. This collaboration is set to bring innovative banking services to customers, promising a fresh and advanced approach.

news.headline: Gotcha Covered opens new center in North Tucson run by Kathy Cantoli on Feb 20, 2025. Leader in custom window treatment consultation in U.S. and Canada.
news.summary: In an exciting development, Kathy Cantoli has become part of the franchise family by opening a new Gotcha Covered location in North Tucson/Marana. This custom window treatment consultation leader in the U.S. and Canada, made the announcement on Feb. 20, 2025. Gotcha Covered of North Tucson/Marana marks the latest addition to the company's network, further expanding its reach and service offerings. This move signifies growth and opportunity for both the franchise and the local community.

news.headline: Bybit report on JPY carry trade outlook for 2025, highlights key shifts. Bybit: 2nd largest crypto exchange.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Dubai, UAE, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange based on trading volume, Bybit, launched a fresh FX Insight report. The report focuses on the Japanese yen (JPY) carry trade, showcasing notable changes that may impact this market.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: It's easier to extend duration when not competing with the Fed
TransAlta Corporation reports strong 2024 results, with dividend increase and 2025 annual guidance; ended Dec. 31, 2024.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on February 20, 2025, TransAlta Corporation disclosed its financial performance for the final quarter and the entirety of 2024. The company, listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange as TA and the New York Stock Exchange as TAC, shared these figures without detailing specific numbers.

news.headline: Upbound Group CEO to retire after 40 years, CFO to take over. Tech company addressing needs of underserved consumers.
news.summary: In Plano, Texas, Upbound Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPBD) disclosed that Mitch Fadel, the Chief Executive Officer with 40 years of service, is retiring and resigning from the Board. The Company, specializing in accessible financial solutions for underserved consumers, named Fahmi Karam, the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, as the new CEO. This significant change comes as the company aims to address the evolving financial needs of its customers with inclusive strategies.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: Terming out the debt is a long way off.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: The Biden team shortened treasuries duration in sales
US Treasury Secretary Bessent sees revenue increase and cost decrease under Trump policy
Microchip expands maXTouch M1 Gen to aid large and curved auto displays. Features innovative touch algorithms for superior performance.
news.summary: Cutting-edge touchscreen controllers have been developed to tackle issues related to large screens by utilizing advanced sensing algorithms. These controllers ensure swift and dependable touch functionality, enhancing user experience significantly. They have proven crucial for screens of considerable sizes, offering improved responsiveness and accuracy.

news.headline: DigitalBridge Group, Inc. announced Q4 and 2024 full year financial results. Q4 earnings call and presentation to follow.
news.summary: Headquartered in Boca Raton, Florida, DigitalBridge Group, Inc. (NYSE: DBRG), a prominent global alternative asset manager focusing on digital infrastructure investments, released its financial performance for the last quarter and full year of 2024. Information regarding earnings can be accessed through the Q4 2024 Presentation. The company has scheduled an earnings conference call and presentation to delve into the details of the fourth quarter and full year 2024 results. For more details, kindly refer to the provided link.

news.headline: UL Solutions Inc. (NYSE: ULS) reports strong Q4 and full year results for 2024, marking a successful first year as a public company.
news.summary: UL Solutions Inc., a global leader in safety science services, announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2024. The company, listed on NYSE as ULS, reported strong performance during the fourth quarter, marking a successful first year post its public offering. There was consistent growth seen across all segments, service lines, and regions. The team's efforts were commendable, reflecting sustained momentum in the business.

news.headline: Identiv to hold Q4 earnings call on March 5, 2025, at 5:00 PM EST. Financial results for Q4 and fiscal year 2024 to be discussed.
news.summary: In Santa Ana, California, Identiv, Inc. (NASDAQ: INVE), a prominent provider of RFID-enabled solutions for IoT, is scheduled to conduct a teleconference and webcast on Wednesday, March 5, 2025, at 5:00 PM EST regarding its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending December 31, 2024. The detailed financial results will be released in a press release before the meeting and can be accessed on the investor relations portion of the company's website.

news.headline: Dassault Systèmes announces 3DEXPERIENCE World 2025 in Houston on Feb. 23-26 for SOLIDWORKS users with thousands expected to attend.
news.summary: Dassault Systèmes has revealed that their annual event, 3DEXPERIENCE World 2025, focused on SOLIDWORKS and the 3DEXPERIENCE platform user community, will occur in Houston from February 23 to February 26. This event expects to draw thousands of attendees, including designers, engineers, entrepreneurs, business leaders, makers, and students. It serves as the premier platform for exploring the technologies, trends, and strategies reshaping product development.

news.headline: Fiserv authorized to repurchase 60 million shares of stock in addition to existing authorization.
news.summary: Fiserv, Inc., a prominent global provider of payments and financial services technology, recently revealed that its Board of Directors sanctioned the repurchase of 60 million shares of the company's common stock. This buyback authorization is an addition to the existing shares available for repurchase. Fiserv has the flexibility to repurchase these shares either through open market transactions or through privately negotiated deals, based on management's evaluation. The company's stock is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol FI.

news.headline: Corsair's Elgato Stream Deck Studio wins Best of Show Award at ISE 2025, leading AV & broadcast exhibition.
news.summary: In Milpitas, California, Corsair Gaming, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRSR) revealed that their Elgato Stream Deck Studio achieved the Best of Show Award at ISE 2025, a top professional AV and broadcast exhibition. The Elgato Stream Deck Studio, known for its cutting-edge innovation in live production control, stood out among competitors. Corsair is a global leader in high-performance products catering to gamers, streamers, content creators, and gaming PC builders. This award highlights the company's dedication to pushing boundaries in the industry.

news.headline: PE and VC fund accountants expect tech changes in 2025, per Dynamo Software survey. AI, automation, and analytics to drive transformation, with challenges in data integration and ESG reporting.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by Dynamo Software in Boston reveals that by the year 2025, artificial intelligence (AI), automation, and analytics are expected to revolutionize fund accounting. However, the survey also highlights potential obstacles such as difficulties in data integration and environmental, social, and governance (ESG) reporting. This transformation in fund accounting is projected to significantly impact the industry, showcasing the increasing importance of incorporating advanced technologies.

news.headline: Upbound Group, Inc. discloses Q4 and full year 2024 results, with a conference call scheduled at 9 a.m. ET. CEO and CFO to host.
news.summary: In Plano, Texas, Upbound Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:UPBD) revealed their financial outcomes for the quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2024. Interested parties can access the earnings release, financial tables, and accompanying documents on the Company's investor relations page at https://investor.upbound.com. A conference call is scheduled for today at 9 a.m. ET, led by Mitch Fadel, Chief Executive Officer, and Fahmi Karam, Chief Financial Officer, to discuss the financial figures and offer insights into projections for 2025.

news.headline: San Francisco Equity Partners acquires majority stake in Formula Corp, a leading cleaning products developer. Co-founders remain shareholders.
news.summary: San Francisco Equity Partners (SFEP), a private equity firm in San Francisco, has recently acquired a majority stake in Formula Corp, a prominent formulator and contract manufacturer of cleaning products. The terms of this acquisition have not been publicly disclosed. The co-founders of Formula Corp, Chas Werner and Alan Gangl, will remain shareholders in the company. Formula Corp is known for its innovative approaches in the industry.

news.headline: Walmart increases annual dividend by 13% to $0.94/share, marking 52nd year of increases. Paid in 4 installments.
news.summary: Walmart Inc.'s Board of Directors, at its headquarters in Bentonville, Arkansas, approved an annual cash dividend of $0.94 per share for fiscal year 2026. This marks a significant 13% increase from the previous fiscal year's dividend of $0.83 per share. Shareholders can expect to receive the $0.94 per share dividend in four quarterly installments of $0.235 per share each. The record dates for eligibility to receive the dividend are March 21, 2025, and the payable dates are scheduled for April 7, 2025, and May 9, 2025.

news.headline: Shake Shack releases Q4 2024 financial results, to host conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET with CEO Robert Lynch and CFO Katherine Fogertey.
news.summary: Shake Shack Inc. has released its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending December 25, 2024. The company's Shareholder Letter can be accessed on its Investor Relations website. A conference call is scheduled at 8:00 a.m. ET, led by CEO Robert Lynch and CFO Katherine Fogertey. Shake Shack is listed on the NYSE under the symbol SHAK. For more details, refer to the Q4 2024 Shareholder Letter on the company's website.

news.headline: Superior Industries will release Q4 and full year 2024 financial results in Southfield, Mich., and host a conference call.
news.summary: Superior Industries based in Southfield, Michigan, has announced they will be releasing their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. They will also be hosting a conference call in relation to this release.

news.headline: EnviroGold Global's non-brokered private placement's first tranche closed, generating CDN $3,682,595.1 in gross proceeds.
news.summary: Toronto, February 20, 2025 - EnviroGold Global Limited, a clean technology company specializing in monetizing mine waste and tailings to reduce environmental impact, has completed the first tranche of a non-brokered private placement. The company, trading as CSE: NVRO, OTCQB: ESGLF, and FSE: YGK, announced that the first tranche of this placement generated gross proceeds totaling $3,682,595.1. This successful fundraising effort marks a significant step for EnviroGold in its mission to address environmental and social challenges associated with mining activities.

news.headline: Luckin Coffee reveals financial results for Q4 and FY2024.
NODAR & Leopard Imaging partner to showcase 3D vision at NVIDIA GTC 2025, integrating Hammerhead software & GMSL2 cameras.
news.summary: A collaboration has been formed between NODAR and Leopard Imaging to showcase advanced 3D vision abilities at NVIDIA’s GTC conference from March 17th to 21st, 2025. NODAR, known for stereo vision technology, and Leopard Imaging, a prominent player in intelligent vision design and production, are partnering to combine NODAR’s Hammerhead software with Leopard Imaging’s GMSL2 cameras. The integration will feature Leopard Imaging’s IMX031 based solutions running on the NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin Platform. This partnership aims to highlight the cutting-edge advancements in 3D vision technology, with a special focus on showcasing their capabilities at the upcoming NVIDIA conference.

news.headline: "Americold reports Q4 and full year 2024 financial results, exceeding expectations."
Agios Pharmaceuticals will present at TD Cowen 45th Annual Healthcare Conference on March 3, 2025, 10:30 am ET.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, based in CAMBRIDGE, Agios Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: AGIO) disclosed plans for its management team to participate in the TD Cowen 45th Annual Healthcare Conference on March 3, 2025, at 10:30 a.m. ET. The company, known for its work in cellular metabolism and PK activation therapies for rare diseases, is set to present at the conference.

news.headline: atai Life Sciences closed public offering with 26,190,477 common shares and 3,928,571 additional shares at $2.10 each s raising $63.25 million.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, atai Life Sciences (NASDAQ: ATAI) completed its public offering of 26,190,477 common shares. Following this, on February 17, 2025, the underwriter opted to purchase an extra 3,928,571 common shares at a price of $2.10 per share, exercising their full option. The underwriter's acquisition was finalized on February 19, 2025. The total gross proceeds generated from this offering and the additional share purchase amount to around $63.25 million before deduction of underwriting discounts, commissions, and other associated offering expenses incurred by atai Life Sciences as a part of this transaction focused on revolutionizing mental health disorder treatment.

news.headline: LEEF Brands to join CEM's Whistler Capital Conference, showcasing 2025 growth strategies, targeting NY market expansion.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 20, 2025, LEEF Brands Inc. (CSE: LEEF) (OTCQB: LEEEF), a prominent cannabis extraction company, shared that its CEO Micah Anderson and CFO Kevin Wilson will be partaking in the CEM Whistler Capital Conference held from February 21 to 23, 2025. This event presents a platform for LEEF to delve into its growth strategy for 2025, highlighting intentions for venturing into New York’s flourishing cannabis sector.

news.headline: Global online trading platform market expected to reach USD 17.42 billion by 2033. AI integration accelerates market growth.
news.summary: The global online trading platform market is experiencing rapid growth as more individuals and organizations turn to digital investment solutions, driven by the shift towards mobile trading and technological advancements. These platforms, offered by brokerage firms, provide real-time market data and automated trading features, making it easy for users to trade conveniently. Assets such as stocks, forex, and cryptocurrencies are gaining popularity due to the advanced tools available. Artificial Intelligence (AI) integration is playing a key role in enhancing platform efficiency, market analysis, and decision-making processes. AI-powered robo-advisors are providing personalized investment suggestions, leading to more accurate market trend predictions and risk management. A survey in November 2024 by ANMI WIRC showed that 84% of Indian stockbrokers planned to increase IT budgets for 2024-25, focusing on AI and machine learning. This continuous innovation and influx of new competitors are further driving market growth and fueling expansion.

news.headline: Eloro Resources expands tin zone in Bolivia with 49.5m at 0.55% Sn within 91.5m at 0.34% Sn. 5,799.4m drilled in 11 holes.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Eloro Resources Ltd. shared updates on its ongoing diamond drilling program in the Santa Barbara starter pit region within the Iska Iska silver-tin polymetallic project located in Potosi Department, Bolivia. The Company, listed as TSX: ELO, OTCQX: ELRRF, FSE: P2QM, reported assay results from 5,799.4m of drilling across eleven (11) holes. The drilling utilized PQ core size in most holes to secure more comprehensive and accurate core samples for analysis.

news.headline: Global hydraulic oil coolers market to reach USD 2,984 million by 2035, growing at 5.9% CAGR from USD 1,589 million in 2024. Key players include HYDAC International GmbH and MANN+HUMMEL. North America expected to hold 3% market share in 2035. Air-cooled hydraulic oil coolers projected to grow at 4% CAGR with an absolute opportunity of USD 821.3 million between 2025-2035.
news.summary: The global hydraulic oil coolers market was valued at US$1,589 million in 2024 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 5.9% to reach US$2,984 million by 2035. These devices regulate fluid temperatures in various industries like construction, mining, and manufacturing to maintain optimal performance of heavy equipment. The demand for hydraulic oil coolers is increasing due to energy-efficient designs, miniaturization, and smart monitoring systems, driven by trends in automation and sustainability. Key players in the market include HYDAC International GmbH and MANN+HUMMEL. North America is estimated to hold a 3% market share in 2035, with air-cooled hydraulic oil coolers projected to grow at a CAGR of 8% between 2025 and 2035, creating an absolute $821.3 million opportunity. North America and East Asia are expected to create a combined $635.7 million opportunity between...

news.headline: Skye Bioscience to present at TD Cowen Health Care Conference. CEO to present overview, attend 1x1 meetings.
news.summary: In San Diego, California on February 20, 2025, Skye Bioscience, Inc. (Nasdaq: SKYE) declared that Punit Dhillon, the Chief Executive Officer of the company, will offer a corporate overview and will be open for one-on-one meetings at the TD Cowen 45th Annual Health Care Conference. Skye Bioscience, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company concentrating on discovering new therapeutic pathways for obesity and various metabolic health disorders. The conference provides an opportunity for industry professionals to engage, share insights, and discuss potential collaborations in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Enviri Corp Q4 2024: Revenue $559M, GAAP loss $82M. Adjusted EBITDA $70M, up 5% organically.
news.summary: Enviri Corporation (NYSE: NVRI) based in Philadelphia released its fourth quarter 2024 results, indicating revenues of $559 million. The consolidated loss from continuing operations for this period on a U.S. GAAP basis was $82 million. The Adjusted EBITDA for Q4 stood at $70 million, showing a 9% decrease compared to the previous year on a reported basis, but a 5% increase organically.

news.headline: Lantronix PoE++ switches boost efficiency in 413,000 sq.ft. warehouse, cutting energy costs and reducing carbon footprint.
news.summary: Mouser Electronics has recently opened a spacious warehouse spanning 413,000 square feet. This new facility has successfully cut down energy usage expenses significantly and has also effectively reduced the company's carbon footprint.

news.headline: Dr. Jinjun Shi to present cancer therapy findings at US HUPO 2025, focusing on Seer's Proteograph™ Product Suite.
news.summary: A lecture will be given by Dr. Jinjun Shi from Brigham and Women's Hospital and Harvard Medical School to discuss a research study focused on proteomic changes triggered by an innovative cancer treatment method. These changes were identified through the use of Seer's Proteograph™ Product Suite. Dr. Shi's seminar aims to shed light on how this novel approach impacts proteomic profiles, offering insights into its potential for cancer therapy.

news.headline: Koryx Copper reports improved drill results at Haib Copper Project in S. Namibia, with numerous high-grade intercepts.
BigCommerce reports 2024 revenue of $332.9M (+8%), total ARR $349.6M (+4%), and enterprise ARR $261.6M (+7%). Operating cash flow of $26.3M.
news.summary: In the past year, total revenue reached $332.9 million, showing an 8% increase compared to the previous year. The Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) totaled $349.6 million, marking a 4% increase from the prior year. Specifically, Enterprise ARR amounted to $261.6 million, reflecting a 7% growth compared to the prior year. The full-year operating cash flow stood at $26.3 million. These financial numbers demonstrate positive performance and growth for the company over the past year.

news.headline: Pool Corp announces 2024 year-end and Q4 results, gives 2025 earnings outlook.
SCRS and Fortrea team up to drive collaboration in clinical research through sponsorship; enhancing trial efficiency.
news.summary: Fortrea has announced its sponsorship of the Collaborate Forward Working Group by SCRS, aiming to foster cooperation for improved efficiency in clinical trials. This sponsorship aims to facilitate collaboration amongst stakeholders within the industry, with the goal of enhancing the overall process. The initiative will bring together a diverse group of professionals to exchange insights, strategies, and best practices to streamline the clinical trial process. By supporting this working group, Fortrea hopes to contribute to the advancement of clinical trials and enhance the success rates of these studies. The sponsorship demonstrates Fortrea's commitment to driving innovation and efficiency in the field. This collaboration is expected to involve X number of professionals from various sectors and is anticipated to lead to a Y% increase in efficiency in clinical trial processes.

news.headline: Kaltura reports financial results for Q4 & full year 2024, projects outlook for 2025.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Kaltura, Inc. disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024. The video experience cloud company shared its outlook for the initial quarter and entire year of 2025. The report did not specify the numbers.

news.headline: Enthusiast Gaming's Pocket Gamer Connects expands globally with Barcelona Conference and Shanghai Summit.
news.summary: Enthusiast Gaming, a prominent gaming company, is set to expand its reach globally with the introduction of two new events. Pocket Gamer Connects will now include a conference in Barcelona and a summit in Shanghai. This significant expansion showcases the company's commitment to engaging with a wider audience. The Barcelona conference aims to bring together gaming enthusiasts and industry professionals from around the world, while the Shanghai summit will provide a platform for networking and collaboration in the gaming sector. This move highlights Enthusiast Gaming's dedication to fostering connections within the global gaming community.

news.headline: Veritone's AI solutions added to DoD's Tradewinds Marketplace, achieving "Awardable" status; includes Illuminate, Redact, and Track applications.
news.summary: Veritone, Inc. (NASDAQ: VERI) based in Denver, has been recognized as “Awardable” by Chief Digital and Artificial Intelligence Office’s (CDAO) Tradewinds Solutions Marketplace. This achievement pertains to their Illuminate, Redact, and Track applications being included in the Tradewinds Marketplace. This marketplace is a key component of Tradewinds, the Department of Defense’s set of tools. Veritone's solutions offer human-centered enterprise AI and have gained prominence in this platform. The inclusion of these applications signifies a significant development for the company within this specialized market.

news.headline: ChampionX Corp (Nasdaq: CHX) declared quarterly dividend of $0.095 per share, for shareholders on record by April 4, 2025.
news.summary: Headquartered in The Woodlands, Texas, on February 20, 2025, ChampionX Corporation (Nasdaq: CHX) revealed that its Board of Directors approved a standard quarterly dividend of $0.095 per share. This dividend applies to the company's common stock with a par value of $0.01 per share. Shareholders as of the record date on April 4, 2025, will receive the payment on April 25, 2025.

news.headline: Laser Photonics & Fonon Tech partner with NOBLE to deliver TAA-compliant laser solutions; two major orders completed.
news.summary: Laser Photonics Corporation (LPC) has successfully delivered two DefenseTech MRLS Finishing laser systems (DTMF-1030) in collaboration with Fonon Technologies. These systems are fully Trade Agreements Act (TAA)-compliant and were acquired through NOBLE. LPC, known for industrial laser systems, completed the delivery for these cutting-edge machines, crucial for material processing applications. The DTMF-1030 laser systems are set to be utilized by the Marine sector, marking a significant advancement in laser technology deployment.

news.headline: Walmart's reported revenue grew by 4.1% to $180.6B, with operating income up 8.3% or 9.4% adjusted (cc), as per Q4 2021 results.
news.summary: In Bentonville, Arkansas, Walmart Inc. (NYSE: WMT) reported its fourth-quarter highlights, including a revenue of $180.6 billion, marking a 4.1% increase, or 5.3% on a constant currency basis. The gross margin rate saw a 53 basis points increase, driven by Walmart U.S. The operating income surged by $0.6 billion, equivalent to an 8.3% rise, with adjusted figures up by 9.4% on a constant currency basis. This growth was attributed to higher gross margins and increased membership income. The company also experienced improved economics in eCommerce. Global eCommerce sales saw a significant uptick of 16%, primarily fueled by store-fulfilled pickup & delivery services and the U.S. marketplace. However, the growth was somewhat hindered by timing issues.

news.headline: Loxo secures growth investment of $115M led by Tritium Partners to boost AI and product development.
news.summary: Today, in Austin, Texas, Loxo, a company specializing in talent intelligence platform and recruiting software, disclosed securing a growth investment. The investment was fronted by Tritium Partners, a private equity firm known for collaborating with skilled founders to develop businesses further. This investment marks a significant milestone in Loxo's journey, signifying a promising future.

news.headline: Sabio partners with Sling TV for creators; specializes in Adtech. (Bell: Toronto, Feb. 2025)
news.summary: Today, an Adtech company known as Sabio Holdings (TSXV: SBIO) (OTCQB: SABOF) headquartered in Los Angeles revealed a new collaboration with Sling. Sabio focuses on assisting leading international brands in connecting with, involving, and confirming streaming TV viewers.

news.headline: SolarBank partners with Viridi on 3.06 MW solar and 1.2 MWH battery project in Buffalo, NY. Innovative battery tech used.
news.summary: SolarBank Corporation, a company listed on NASDAQ (stock symbol SUUN), Cboe CA (stock symbol SUNN), and FSE (stock symbol GY2), is set to implement a project using Viridi's lithium-ion battery packs. These battery packs come equipped with advanced fire suppression systems that comply with strict safety standards. The announcement was made in Toronto on February 20, 2025.

news.headline: Alsco Uniforms donates $50,000 for California wildfire recovery; aiding families rebuild lives.
news.summary: Financial contributions and donations of essential items are aiding families in their recovery efforts as they work to reconstruct their livelihoods. As of February 20, 2025 in Salt Lake City, Alsco Uniforms, with laundry facilities in Vista, Anaheim, and Los Angeles, is playing a crucial role in providing uniforms, linens, and floor items to support the affected communities. The company's support is making a significant impact in the wake of recent events.
